scenarios.description: Read-only inspection of scheduler and tool execution flow.
prompts: Without modifying any files and without asking follow-up questions, inspect this repository and explain how tool calls are parsed, scheduled, and executed. Focus on executor and session flow.

scenarios.description: Read-only inspection of read/edit/write stale-file protections.
prompts: Without modifying files and without asking follow-up questions, find where stale-file protection is enforced for read/edit/write flows and summarize the exact guard conditions.
